# Gingiris Growth Tools

> Hands-on startup growth playbooks, open source marketing guides, and SEO/GEO strategy — by Iris (former AFFiNE COO, 60k GitHub stars, 30x Product Hunt #1 winner).

## About

Growth Tools is a practitioner-written resource covering international growth (出海), open source marketing, and content strategy. All content is based on direct experience growing AFFiNE from 0 to 60,000 GitHub stars, launching on Product Hunt 30+ times, and helping startups go global.

**Author:** Iris — Former COO of AFFiNE. 30x Product Hunt #1. $10M+ raised. Users in 200+ countries. Now runs Gingiris open source go-global consultancy.

## Tools Directory

- [Growth Tools Directory](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/) — 100+ curated tools for startups going global, organized by: SEO, social listening, competitor analysis, developer marketing, community building, content distribution

## Open Source Growth

- [I Led AFFiNE from 0 to 60k GitHub Stars](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/03/07/i-led-affine-from-0-to-60k-github-stars-here-are-my-open-source-growth-playbooks/) — Complete open source growth playbook with real metrics
- [How to Get More GitHub Stars: 33k Case Study](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/03/25/how-to-get-more-github-stars-the-definitive-guide-33k-stars-case-study/) — Definitive guide with proven tactics
- [GitHub Star Growth: 10 Proven Tactics](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/03/27/github-star-growth-10-proven-tactics-that-got-us-33k-stars/) — Step-by-step tactics that drove 33k stars
- [Open Source Marketing: Complete 2026 Guide](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/04/03/open-source-marketing-the-complete-guide/) — Full OSS marketing strategy
- [GitHub PR Template Guide](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/04/02/github-pr-template-guide/) — PR templates that improve contributor experience
- [GitHub Issue Template Guide](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/04/02/github-issue-template-guide/) — Issue templates for better community engagement
- [GitHub README Best Practices](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/03/29/github-readme-best-practices-how-to-write-a-readme-that-gets-stars/) — READMEs that attract stars and contributors
- [GitHub Stars History: Track & Analyze Growth](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/03/30/github-stars-history-how-to-track-and-analyze-repository-growth/) — How to measure and analyze star growth

## Product Hunt Launch

- [Product Hunt Launch Playbook: 30x #1 Winner](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/03/25/product-hunt-launch-playbook-the-definitive-guide-30x-1-winner/) — Definitive guide from someone who won 30 times
- [How to Launch on Product Hunt Step-by-Step](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/03/29/how-to-launch-on-product-hunt-stepbystep-guide-30x-1-winner/) — Tactical step-by-step execution guide
- [Startup Launch Checklist: 47 Tasks](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/03/25/startup-launch-checklist-47-tasks-before-during-after-launch-day/) — Complete pre/during/post launch checklist

## Startup & SaaS Marketing

- [Startup Marketing Strategy: 0 to 1,000 Users](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/04/01/startup-marketing-strategy-from-zero-to-first-1000-users/) — Practical framework for early-stage growth
- [Word of Mouth Marketing for SaaS](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/04/03/word-of-mouth-marketing/) — Building referral engines
- [Growth Hacking for Startups: 20 Tactics](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/04/03/growth-hacking-for-startups/) — Proven growth experiments
- [Content Marketing for Startups: 0 to 10k Visitors](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/04/03/content-marketing-for-startups/) — Content strategy from scratch
- [SaaS Go-to-Market Strategy: $0 to $10M ARR](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/03/27/saas-gotomarket-strategy-the-complete-framework-from-0-to-10m-arr/) — Complete GTM framework
- [How to Find Beta Users for Your SaaS](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/04/03/how-to-find-beta-users-for-your-saas/) — Recruiting first users
- [Product-Market Fit: 25 Signs + Checklist](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/blog/2026/04/03/product-market-fit-checklist/) — How to know when you have PMF
